creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rakuco
Date: Wed Jan 15 19:25:17 2014
New Revision: 339808
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339808
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r339808/

Log:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter.
  - Update to 0.9.97.
  - Support staging.
  - Add support for the DOCS and NLS options.
  
  PR:		ports/185807
  Submitted by:	Luca Pizzamiglio <luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/kdiff3/Makefile
  head/textproc/kdiff3/distinfo
  head/textproc/kdiff3/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/kdiff3/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/kdiff3/Makefile	Wed Jan 15 19:10:16 2014	(r339807)
+++ head/textproc/kdiff3/Makefile	Wed Jan 15 19:25:17 2014	(r339808)
@@ -2,22 +2,29 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	kdiff3
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.95
-PORTREVISION=	4
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.97
+#PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	textproc kde
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A KDE4 graphical frontend for diff
+MAINTAINER=	luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	KDE4 graphical frontend for diff
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 USE_KDE4=	kdelibs libkonq kdeprefix kdehier automoc4
-USES=		cmake gettext
 USE_QT4=	moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
+USES=		cmake
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	NLS DOCS
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	NLS
+
+OPTIONS_SUB=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-patch:
-#Fix build with kdelibs>=4.5.0
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,V4.1.2-Based,V4.2-Based,g' \
-		${WRKSRC}/doc/*/index.docbook
+NLS_USES=	gettext
+NLS_CMAKE_OFF=	-DBUILD_po:BOOL=FALSE
+NLS_CMAKE_ON=	-DBUILD_po:BOOL=TRUE
+DOCS_CMAKE_OFF=	-DBUILD_doc:BOOL=FALSE
+DOCS_CMAKE_ON=	-DBUILD_doc:BOOL=TRUE
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/kdiff3/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/kdiff3/distinfo	Wed Jan 15 19:10:16 2014	(r339807)
+++ head/textproc/kdiff3/distinfo	Wed Jan 15 19:25:17 2014	(r339808)

+SIZE (kdiff3-0.9.97.tar.gz) = 1803769
